camp-0sp11nk20whpc159suisn.name: Loyal Customers High Spenders 20% Off
camp-0sp11nk20whpc159suisn.goal: Reward loyal customers who have spent over 15,000 with a 20% discount coupon to drive repeat purchases.
camp-0sp11nk20whpc159suisn.message_template: Hey {{name}}! 🌟 As one of our most valued customers, here is a special 20% off coupon for your next purchase: LOYAL20. Thank you for being with us!
camp-0sp11nk20whpc159suisn.created_by_prompt: Target loyal customers with total spent above 15000 and send them a 20% discount coupon via WhatsApp.

camp-1a4xockfwplgughc5y96sq.name: Lapsing Customers Wakeup SMS
camp-1a4xockfwplgughc5y96sq.goal: Re-engage customers who haven't made a purchase in the last 45 days with a wakeup coupon.
camp-1a4xockfwplgughc5y96sq.message_template: Hey {{name}}, we miss you! Use code WAKEUP15 for 15% off your next order. Valid for 48 hours!
camp-1a4xockfwplgughc5y96sq.created_by_prompt: Segment lapsing customers who haven't ordered in 45 days and compose an SMS wakeup coupon

welcome-id.content:
Welcome to Xeno Mini! 🚀
I'm your AI marketer. Describe your retail campaign goals in plain English, and I will parse your intent, construct custom segments from our regional database, draft a personalized template, and launch your multichannel engagements.

k5szvej7dygctjg1nywa4.content: Hello! How can I help you with your marketing campaigns today? I can help you segment your customers, draft personalized messages, or analyze campaign performance.

k9q7y559ex2u2idw6m1mv.content: Target loyal customers with total spent above 15000 and send them a 20% discount coupon via WhatsApp.

xfqdub13cvl7b7q8gpu3cm.content: I have created a campaign targeting your top-tier loyal customers (total spent > 15,000). We will send them a personalized WhatsApp message with a 20% discount coupon to show our appreciation.

metadata.segment_description: Customers with total spent greater than 15,000
metadata.message_template: Hey {{name}}! 🌟 As one of our most valued customers, here is a special 20% off coupon for your next purchase: LOYAL20. Thank you for being with us!

kbmadx4wbieaumuwczz8uf.content: I have created a re-engagement campaign targeting customers who haven't purchased in the last 45 days. We will send them a personalized SMS with a 15% discount coupon to win them back.

metadata.segment_description: Customers whose last purchase was more than 45 days ago.
metadata.message_template: Hey {{name}}, we miss you! Use code WAKEUP15 for 15% off your next order. Valid for 48 hours!

pi8hcfajvnhforlmaf0xsh.content:
Here are some quick campaign presets you can launch right away:

1. VIP Appreciation (WhatsApp): Target customers with total spent > 10,000. Send a 'Thank You' note with an exclusive 15% off.
2. Win-Back Lapsed Buyers (SMS): Target customers who haven't ordered in 60 days. Send a 'We Miss You' 20% discount.
3. Category Cross-Sell (Email): Target customers who bought from a specific category (e.g., 'Apparel') to recommend matching products.

Just let me know which one you'd like to run, or describe your own goal!
